requirement_topic.en: Residual Current / Shock Protection — DC Fault Current Detection
requirement_topic.zh: 剩余电流 / 触电保护 — 直流故障电流检测
requirement_topic.zht: 剩餘電流 / 觸電保護 — 直流故障電流檢測

summary.en: EU requires that EV charging equipment incorporate protection against residual DC fault currents. IEC 61851-1 (Ed. 3, 2017) and HD 60364-7-722 mandate that Mode 2 and Mode 3 EVSE either (a) include a Type B RCD per IEC/EN 62955, which detects both AC and DC residual currents (≥6 mA DC), or (b) an integrated Residual Direct Current Detecting Device (RDC-DD) complying with IEC/EN 62955 in combination with a Type A RCD. This prevents DC fault currents — which are generated by on-board chargers — from blinding a conventional Type A RCD and rendering shock protection ineffective. [UNVERIFIED: exact clause cross-references within HD 60364-7-722:2018 and IEC 61851-1:2017 Annex B should be confirmed against current published editions before regulatory submission.]
summary.zh: 欧盟要求电动汽车充电设备具备直流故障电流的保护能力。IEC 61851-1（第3版，2017年）及HD 60364-7-722规定，模式二和模式三的电动汽车充电装置须（a）配备符合IEC/EN 62955的B型RCD（可检测交流及直流剩余电流，直流检测门限≥6 mA），或（b）安装符合IEC/EN 62955的集成式直流剩余电流检测装置（RDC-DD）并搭配A型RCD。此举防止车载充电机产生的直流故障电流令传统A型RCD失效，从而保障触电保护有效性。[未经核实：HD 60364-7-722:2018及IEC 61851-1:2017附录B的具体条款交叉引用，正式提交法规前须对照最新版本核实。]
summary.zht: 歐盟要求電動汽車充電設備具備直流故障電流的保護能力。IEC 61851-1（第3版，2017年）及HD 60364-7-722規定，模式二和模式三的電動汽車充電裝置須（a）配備符合IEC/EN 62955的B型RCD（可偵測交流及直流剩餘電流，直流偵測門限≥6 mA），或（b）安裝符合IEC/EN 62955的集成式直流剩餘電流偵測裝置（RDC-DD）並搭配A型RCD。此舉防止車載充電機產生的直流故障電流令傳統A型RCD失效，從而保障觸電保護有效性。[未經核實：HD 60364-7-722:2018及IEC 61851-1:2017附錄B的具體條款交叉引用，正式提交法規前須對照最新版本核實。]

standards_or_laws: IEC 61851-1:2017 (Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements)
IEC/EN 62955:2018 (Residual direct current detecting device — RDC-DD)
HD 60364-7-722:2018 (Low-voltage electrical installations — Requirements for special installations — Supplies for electric vehicles) [UNVERIFIED: edition year]

summary.en: GB/T 18487.1-2023 (Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements) includes leakage current protection requirements for EV charging. However, Chinese market products commonly ship with Type A RCDs (AC residual current only, per GB 6829 / IEC 61008 series), which cannot detect the smooth DC residual currents produced by switched-mode on-board chargers. GB/T 18487.1 does not explicitly mandate Type B RCD or RDC-DD equivalent performance as a default requirement for all EVSE modes. [UNVERIFIED: The 2023 revision may have updated RCD-type requirements — the exact clause should be confirmed against the published GB/T 18487.1-2023 text.]
summary.zh: GB/T 18487.1-2023（电动汽车传导充电系统 第1部分：通用要求）包含电动汽车充电设备的漏电保护要求。然而，中国市场产品通常配备仅能检测交流剩余电流的A型RCD（参照GB 6829 / IEC 61008系列），无法检测开关式车载充电机产生的平滑直流剩余电流。GB/T 18487.1并未对所有充电模式的充电设备明确强制要求B型RCD或等效RDC-DD性能。[未经核实：2023年修订版可能已更新RCD类型要求，正式使用前须对照GB/T 18487.1-2023发布文本核实相关条款。]
summary.zht: GB/T 18487.1-2023（電動汽車傳導充電系統 第1部分：通用要求）包含電動汽車充電設備的漏電保護要求。然而，中國市場產品通常配備僅能偵測交流剩餘電流的A型RCD（參照GB 6829 / IEC 61008系列），無法偵測開關式車載充電機產生的平滑直流剩餘電流。GB/T 18487.1並未對所有充電模式的充電設備明確強制要求B型RCD或等效RDC-DD性能。[未經核實：2023年修訂版可能已更新RCD類型要求，正式使用前須對照GB/T 18487.1-2023發布文本核實相關條款。]

standards_or_laws: GB/T 18487.1-2023 (Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements)
GB 6829 (Residual current operated protective devices — general rules, Chinese national standard)
IEC 61008 series (Residual current operated circuit-breakers — Type A, referenced in CN practice)

gap.en: EU mandates Type B RCD or integrated RDC-DD (IEC/EN 62955) for DC fault current detection at ≥6 mA. Chinese EV chargers commonly ship with Type A RCDs only, which are blind to smooth DC residual currents. Exporting a Chinese unit to the EU without upgrading to a Type B RCD or adding a compliant RDC-DD is a safety-compliance blocker: the product will fail HD 60364-7-722 / IEC 61851-1 conformity assessment. This typically requires hardware redesign or addition of an external certified Type B RCD in the installation. [UNVERIFIED: final gap scope depends on product mode (Mode 2 vs Mode 3) and whether the unit has an integrated protection circuit already certified to IEC/EN 62955.]
gap.zh: 欧盟强制要求配备B型RCD或集成RDC-DD（IEC/EN 62955），直流故障电流检测门限≥6 mA。中国电动汽车充电器通常仅配备A型RCD，对平滑直流剩余电流无感知。未升级为B型RCD或未加装合规RDC-DD即出口至欧盟，属于安全合规阻断项：产品将无法通过HD 60364-7-722 / IEC 61851-1符合性评估。通常需要硬件重新设计，或在安装端加装经认证的外置B型RCD。[未经核实：最终差距范围取决于产品充电模式（模式二或模式三）及是否已集成经IEC/EN 62955认证的保护电路。]
gap.zht: 歐盟強制要求配備B型RCD或集成RDC-DD（IEC/EN 62955），直流故障電流偵測門限≥6 mA。中國電動汽車充電器通常僅配備A型RCD，對平滑直流剩餘電流無感知。未升級為B型RCD或未加裝合規RDC-DD即出口至歐盟，屬於安全合規阻斷項：產品將無法通過HD 60364-7-722 / IEC 61851-1符合性評估。通常需要硬件重新設計，或在安裝端加裝經認證的外置B型RCD。[未經核實：最終差距範圍取決於產品充電模式（模式二或模式三）及是否已集成經IEC/EN 62955認證的保護電路。]

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory (EU) — required under HD 60364-7-722 / IEC 61851-1 for Mode 2 and Mode 3 EVSE placed on the EU market
mandatory_status.cn: Not explicitly mandatory for export products under GB/T 18487.1; Type A RCD is common practice in CN domestic market

source.publisher: IEC (International Electrotechnical Commission) — IEC/EN 62955:2018 catalog page

compliance_verdict.en: HIGH RISK — Chinese EV chargers shipping with Type A RCD only will not meet EU shock-protection requirements for Mode 2/3 EVSE. Upgrading to a Type B RCD or adding a certified RDC-DD (IEC/EN 62955) is required before EU market entry. This is informational only; confirm against current published standard editions and obtain qualified legal/certification advice before making compliance decisions.
compliance_verdict.zh: 高风险 — 仅配备A型RCD的中国电动汽车充电器不符合欧盟模式二/三充电设备的触电保护要求。进入欧盟市场前须升级为B型RCD或加装符合IEC/EN 62955的RDC-DD。本内容仅供参考，正式合规决策前请对照现行标准最新发布版本并咨询专业法律/认证顾问。
compliance_verdict.zht: 高風險 — 僅配備A型RCD的中國電動汽車充電器不符合歐盟模式二/三充電設備的觸電保護要求。進入歐盟市場前須升級為B型RCD或加裝符合IEC/EN 62955的RDC-DD。本內容僅供參考，正式合規決策前請對照現行標準最新發布版本並諮詢專業法律/認證顧問。

requirement_topic.en: Residual Current Protection — Installation Requirements under Low-Voltage Electrical Installation Standard
requirement_topic.zh: 剩余电流保护 — 低压电气装置标准安装要求
requirement_topic.zht: 剩餘電流保護 — 低壓電氣裝置標準安裝要求

summary.en: Beyond the EVSE product itself, EU low-voltage installation rules (HD 60364-7-722, implementing IEC 60364-7-722) govern the fixed wiring installation of EV charging points. The standard requires that each EV charging point circuit be protected by an RCD with DC fault current detection capability (i.e., Type B or equivalent RDC-DD per IEC/EN 62955), unless the EVSE unit already incorporates such protection internally. The installer (not only the manufacturer) bears responsibility for correct RCD selection in the fixed installation. This creates a dual obligation: both product compliance (IEC 61851-1) and installation compliance (HD 60364-7-722) must be satisfied. [UNVERIFIED: specific clause numbering within HD 60364-7-722:2018 should be confirmed against published text.]
summary.zh: 除充电设备本身外，欧盟低压电气装置规范（HD 60364-7-722，参照IEC 60364-7-722实施）还对电动汽车充电点的固定线路安装提出要求。标准规定，每个电动汽车充电点回路须采用具备直流故障电流检测能力的RCD（即B型RCD或符合IEC/EN 62955的等效RDC-DD）提供保护，除非充电设备本身已内置此类保护功能。安装方（而非仅制造商）对固定安装中正确选用RCD负有责任。这形成双重义务：产品合规（IEC 61851-1）和安装合规（HD 60364-7-722）须同时满足。[未经核实：HD 60364-7-722:2018中的具体条款编号须对照发布文本核实。]
summary.zht: 除充電設備本身外，歐盟低壓電氣裝置規範（HD 60364-7-722，參照IEC 60364-7-722實施）還對電動汽車充電點的固定線路安裝提出要求。標準規定，每個電動汽車充電點回路須採用具備直流故障電流偵測能力的RCD（即B型RCD或符合IEC/EN 62955的等效RDC-DD）提供保護，除非充電設備本身已內置此類保護功能。安裝方（而非僅製造商）對固定安裝中正確選用RCD負有責任。這形成雙重義務：產品合規（IEC 61851-1）和安裝合規（HD 60364-7-722）須同時滿足。[未經核實：HD 60364-7-722:2018中的具體條款編號須對照發布文本核實。]

standards_or_laws: HD 60364-7-722:2018 (CENELEC harmonization document — Low-voltage electrical installations, Part 7-722: Requirements for special installations or locations — Supplies for electric vehicles) [UNVERIFIED: edition]
IEC 60364-7-722 (IEC base standard implemented via HD 60364-7-722 in EU member states)
IEC/EN 62955:2018 (Residual direct current detecting device — RDC-DD)

summary.en: In China, GB 50054 (Low voltage power distribution design code) and GB/T 18487.1 govern EV charging installation design. These standards require leakage protection but do not mandate Type B RCD or RDC-DD for all EV charging circuits. Local installation practice commonly uses Type A RCDs or ELCBs (earth leakage circuit breakers) rated per GB 6829, which lack DC residual current sensitivity. [UNVERIFIED: check whether any 2023–2025 amendments to GB 50054 or related standards introduced Type B RCD requirements for EV circuits in China.]
summary.zh: 在中国，电动汽车充电装置安装设计由GB 50054（低压配电设计规范）及GB/T 18487.1规范。这些标准要求配置漏电保护，但未对所有电动汽车充电回路强制要求B型RCD或RDC-DD。国内安装实践通常使用按GB 6829规格选用的A型RCD或漏电断路器（ELCB），缺乏直流剩余电流检测能力。[未经核实：请核查GB 50054或相关标准2023-2025年修订版是否已对中国电动汽车充电回路引入B型RCD要求。]
summary.zht: 在中國，電動汽車充電裝置安裝設計由GB 50054（低壓配電設計規範）及GB/T 18487.1規範。這些標準要求配置漏電保護，但未對所有電動汽車充電回路強制要求B型RCD或RDC-DD。國內安裝實踐通常使用按GB 6829規格選用的A型RCD或漏電斷路器（ELCB），缺乏直流剩餘電流偵測能力。[未經核實：請核查GB 50054或相關標準2023-2025年修訂版是否已對中國電動汽車充電回路引入B型RCD要求。]

standards_or_laws: GB 50054-2011 (Low voltage power distribution design code — China)
GB/T 18487.1-2023 (Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements)
GB 6829 (Residual current operated protective devices — Chinese national standard, Type A equivalent)

gap.en: EU installation rules (HD 60364-7-722) require the fixed wiring circuit feeding each EV charging point to have Type B RCD or RDC-DD protection unless the EVSE unit already provides this internally. Chinese installation standards do not carry this requirement. A Chinese manufacturer selling hardware to EU installers must either (a) integrate compliant protection internally so the installer's standard Type A RCD is sufficient, or (b) clearly specify in installation documentation that an external Type B RCD is required — otherwise the overall system will be non-compliant regardless of the product's own certification. [UNVERIFIED]
gap.zh: 欧盟安装规范（HD 60364-7-722）要求为每个电动汽车充电点供电的固定线路回路配备B型RCD或RDC-DD保护，除非充电设备本身已内置此类保护。中国安装标准不含此要求。向欧盟安装商销售硬件的中国制造商须（a）在设备内部集成合规保护，使安装商使用标准A型RCD即可满足要求；或（b）在安装文档中明确说明需配置外置B型RCD——否则无论产品自身认证情况如何，整体系统均不合规。[未经核实]
gap.zht: 歐盟安裝規範（HD 60364-7-722）要求為每個電動汽車充電點供電的固定線路回路配備B型RCD或RDC-DD保護，除非充電設備本身已內置此類保護。中國安裝標準不含此要求。向歐盟安裝商銷售硬件的中國製造商須（a）在設備內部集成合規保護，使安裝商使用標準A型RCD即可滿足要求；或（b）在安裝文檔中明確說明需配置外置B型RCD——否則無論產品自身認證情況如何，整體系統均不合規。[未經核實]

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory (EU member states) — HD 60364-7-722 is a CENELEC harmonized document adopted as national standard by EU member states; compliance is required for fixed EV charging installations
mandatory_status.cn: Not required — GB 50054 and GB/T 18487.1 do not mandate Type B RCD or RDC-DD for EV charging circuit installations under Chinese rules

source.publisher: IEC (International Electrotechnical Commission) — IEC 60364-7-722 catalog page

compliance_verdict.en: HIGH RISK — Chinese EV chargers exported to the EU must satisfy both product-level (IEC 61851-1) and installation-level (HD 60364-7-722) DC fault protection requirements. Failure to address the installation-level RCD gap means the product may be certified but the complete installed system is still non-compliant. Manufacturers should specify Type B RCD requirements explicitly in EU installation manuals. This is informational only; obtain qualified certification and legal advice before making compliance decisions.
compliance_verdict.zh: 高风险 — 出口至欧盟的中国电动汽车充电器须同时满足产品级（IEC 61851-1）和安装级（HD 60364-7-722）的直流故障保护要求。若未解决安装端RCD差距，即便产品已取得认证，整套安装系统仍可能不合规。制造商应在欧盟安装说明书中明确注明B型RCD要求。本内容仅供参考，正式合规决策前请咨询专业认证及法律顾问。
compliance_verdict.zht: 高風險 — 出口至歐盟的中國電動汽車充電器須同時滿足產品級（IEC 61851-1）和安裝級（HD 60364-7-722）的直流故障保護要求。若未解決安裝端RCD差距，即便產品已取得認證，整套安裝系統仍可能不合規。製造商應在歐盟安裝說明書中明確注明B型RCD要求。本內容僅供參考，正式合規決策前請諮詢專業認證及法律顧問。
